title: Why does an automation keeping repeating
excerpt:

posts.author: MDPAdmin (Ramon Utting)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have set up a number of automations based on a change of status ie when a status changes to something and another status is something else, then create an item in another board and connect the boards.

What I end up getting sometimes is a continuous loop of the item appearing as a new pulse in the other board every 15 seconds as the automation keeps repeating.

How do I stop this?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@MDPAdmin,

If you want to share the details we may be able to help. However, my recommendation would be to contact monday support at support@monday.com.

posts.author: MDPAdmin (Ramon Utting)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks. I deleted the automations and wrote them again with success this time
